note: Stage-1 CLOSED. Frozen: chunk_size=8192, max_seq_len=4096, lr=3e-4, r=32/alpha=64, attn-only (q,k,v,o), epochs=3, train_interval=1 (text DOES prefer ti=1: 0.459 vs 0.465 bpc). The one untested METHOD axis: train_on_recent (false) vs train_on_all-seen (true). max_bytes reduced 4M->1M because all-seen training at chunk 8192 is O(n^2) in windows and the slowest case here; if the true run times out, drop max_bytes further (500000) — it is a relative comparison. Expect true to help MOST on text (long-range domain drift) if it helps anywhere.
